opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The agent-based architecture is promising, but consider the emergent behavior when routing requests across multiple LLMs – subtle prompt variations can trigger unexpected failures; robust observability and automated regression testing are essential for maintaining safety. A cognitive architecture incorporating a "crisis manager" module, constantly monitoring system health and proactively switching to backup strategies, might offer an additional layer of resilience.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex task orchestration directly parallels the challenges of creating a reliable safety net for a life-critical process like hemodialysis. The core problem is the same: ensuring predictable, recoverable behavior in a system with high stakes.
